ns1:revision.ns1:comment: add links to LUG'21 and LUG'23
ns1:revision.ns1:text:
[https://www.opensfs.org/events/lug-2022/ LUG 2022] was held virtually by [https://www.utk.edu/ University of Tennessee, Knoxville (UTK)] [https://nics.utk.edu/ National Institute of Computational Sciences (NICS)] May 9th-11th.
== LUG 2022 Agenda ==
=== Monday, May 9 – Tutorial Day === {| border=1 cellpadding=0
|- |''' 11:00-11:10''' |'''Opening Remarks''' : Rick Mohr, ORNL
|- |''' 11:15-12:15''' |'''[[Media:Anjus_George_LUG2022_tutorial.pdf|Lustre MGC and Obdclass Deep Dive]]''' ([https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=L9HA1R12DUc video]) : Anjus George, ORNL
|- |''' 12:15-13:15''' |'''Understanding and Measuring I/O Performance''' ([https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-mWVcqscx3Q video]) : Glenn Lockwood, LBNL
|- |''' 13:15-14:15''' |'''[[Media:LUG2022-Advanced_File_Layouts_Tutorial-Mohr.pdf|Advanced Lustre File Layouts]]''' ([[Media:LUG2022-Advanced_File_Layouts_Tutorial_with_Notes-Mohr.pdf|notes]] [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_0y2x4KSHhs video]) : Rick Mohr, ORNL
|- |''' 14:15-15:15''' |'''[[Media:LUG2022-Getting_Most_Mirror_Migrate-Rutman.pdf|Getting the Most out of Mirror and Migrate]]''' ([https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sutpp_dZqIY video]) : Nathan Rutman, HPE
|}
=== Tuesday, May 10 – Day 1 === {| border=1 cellpadding=0
|- |''' 11:00-11:05''' |'''Welcome Remarks''' : Sarp Oral, OpenSFS
|- |''' 11:15-11:45''' |'''[[Media:LUG2022-Community_Release_Update-Jones.pdf|Community Release Update]]''' ([https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LCJ7kGzbX_A video]) : Peter Jones, Whamcloud
|- |''' 11:45-12:15''' |'''ORNL Storage Site Update''' ([https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_eZgOMiHAhQ video]) : Dustin Leverman, ORNL
|- |''' 12:15-12:45''' |'''[[Media:LUG2022-HRT_Lustre_in_Finance-Crusan.pdf|Lustre in finance]]''' ([https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QcJHIgwnbIs video]) : Steve Crusan, Hudson River Trading
|- |''' 14:15-15:15''' |'''[[Media:LUG2022-Understanding_Lustre_Internals-George.pdf|Understanding Lustre File System Internals – A Documentation Initiative]]''' ([https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OQuCG1Vjs0s video]) : Anjus George, Rick Mohr, James Simmons and Sarp Oral, ORNL
|- |''' 14:15-15:15''' |'''[[Media:LUG2022-Lustre_2.16_and_Beyond-Dilger.pdf|Lustre 2.16 and Beyond]]''' ([https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=R4SgHHH6v-c video]) : Andreas Dilger, Whamcloud
|- |''' 14:15-15:15''' |'''[[Media:LUG2022-Improved_lfs_find_Command-Mohr.pdf|The Improved “lfs find” Command]]''' ([https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0C5ae1yrMv4 video]) : Richard Mohr, Anjus George and James Simmons, ORNL
|- |''' 14:15-15:15''' |'''[[Media:LUG2022-Challenges_Efficient_HSM_Cloud-Wilson.pdf|Extant Challenges to Efficient HSM Integration with Cloud-deployed Lustre]]''' ([https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PUS2mKKxS0Y video]) : Ellis Wilson, Joe Atzinger and Brian Barbisch, Microsoft
|}
=== Wednesday, May 11 – Day 2 === {| border=1 cellpadding=0
|- |''' 11:00-11:05''' |'''Opening Remarks''' : Kevin Harms, OpenSFS
|- |''' 11:15-11:45''' |'''OpenSFS Update''' : OpenSFS Board
|- |''' 11:45-12:15''' |'''[[Media:LUG2022-LNet_Multi-Rail_Troubleshooting-Horn.pdf|LNet Multi-Rail Troubleshooting Demo]]''' ([https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TLN56cw9Zgs video]) : Chris Horn, HPE
|- |''' 12:15-12:45''' |'''[[Media:LUG2022-Lustre_Client_Encryption-Buisson.pdf|Lustre Client Encryption]]''' ([https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jicZ6bEB8lU video]) : Sebastien Buisson, Whamcloud
|- |''' 12:45-13:15''' |'''[[Media:LUG2022-Future_IO_Path-Farrell.pdf|Lustre Future I/O Path]]''' ([https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AEXbPtOWz7I video]) : Patrick Farrell, Whamcloud
|- |''' 13:15-13:30''' |'''[[Media:LUG2022-DDN_Sponsor_Talk.pdf|DDN Sponsor Talk]]''' : Paul Wallace, DDN
|- |''' 13:30-14:00''' |'''[[Media:LUG2022-QuickSilver_Policy_Engine-Brumgard.pdf|QuickSilver: A Distributed Policy Engine for Lustre]]''' ([https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RPbzkkR4GP0 video]) : Richard Mohr, Chris Brumgard, Anjus George, James Simmons and Ketan Maheshwari, ORNL
|- |''' 14:00-14:30''' |'''[[Media:LUG2022-Community_Testing_Lustre-Simmons.pdf|Community Testing of Lustre]]''' : James Simmons, ORNL ([https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CHYcCW4ov2w video])
|- |''' 14:30-14:45''' |'''Closing Remarks''' : Sarp Oral, OpenSFS
|} [[Lustre User Group 2021|<- LUG'21]] | [[Lustre User Group 2023|LUG'23 ->]]
[[Category: LUG]] [[Category: Events]]
